changes.value:
## What

Perspectives exist on disk in `.kanban/perspectives/` but nothing is visible in the UI:
1. Tab bar is empty тАФ `PerspectiveTabBar` renders no tabs
2. Clicking "+" appears to do nothing
3. "+" button has no tooltip
4. No perspective commands in the command palette

### Root cause investigation

The pipeline is: `PerspectiveProvider` calls `perspective.list` on mount тЖТ `setPerspectives()` тЖТ `PerspectiveTabBar` renders. Events (`entity-created` with `entity_type === "perspective"`) trigger `refresh()`.

**Likely issues to check in order:**

1. **Is `perspective.list` actually returning data?** Add `console.warn` instrumentation to `PerspectiveProvider.refresh()` (`kanban-app/ui/src/lib/perspective-context.tsx:61-71`) to log the result. Then check OS log with `log show --predicate 'subsystem == \"com.swissarmyhammer.kanban\"' --last 30s` for backend command dispatch.

2. **Is `perspective.save` (from "+") succeeding?** The `.catch(console.error)` at line 71 of `perspective-tab-bar.tsx` swallows errors. Add `console.warn` before/after the dispatch. Check if the file appears in `.kanban/perspectives/` after clicking "+".

3. **Are events reaching the frontend?** After the store delegation fix, `flush_and_emit_for_handle` should emit `entity-created` events with `entity_type: "perspective"`. The `PerspectiveProvider` listens for these at lines 106-116. Add a `console.warn` in the listener to confirm events arrive.

4. **"+" tooltip missing** тАФ `perspective-tab-bar.tsx:154` has `aria-label="Add perspective"` but no `title` attribute.

5. **No command palette entries** тАФ `perspective.yaml` commands don't have `palette: true`. Entity commands get palette visibility via `palette: true` in their YAML defs. Perspective commands need the same.

### Files to modify

- `kanban-app/ui/src/lib/perspective-context.tsx` тАФ add console.warn instrumentation in refresh() and event listeners
- `kanban-app/ui/src/components/perspective-tab-bar.tsx:154` тАФ add `title="New perspective"` to "+" button
- `swissarmyhammer-commands/builtin/commands/perspective.yaml` тАФ add `palette: true` to `perspective.save`, `perspective.delete`, `perspective.list`

### Diagnostic approach

This card is **investigate then fix**. Use `log show` to check backend events. Use `console.warn` instrumentation + `log show --predicate 'subsystem == "com.swissarmyhammer.kanban"'` (not browser console) to trace the full pipeline. Fix whatever is broken.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Existing perspectives in `.kanban/perspectives/` appear in the tab bar on app load
- [ ] Clicking "+" creates a new perspective and it appears in the tab bar immediately
- [ ] "+" button shows tooltip "New perspective" on hover
- [ ] `perspective.save` and `perspective.list` appear in the command palette
- [ ] Verified with real board at `~/Desktop`

## Tests
- [ ] `pnpm test` from `kanban-app/ui/` тАФ existing perspective-tab-bar tests pass
- [ ] Manual: open board at ~/Desktop, verify tab bar shows perspectives
- [ ] Manual: click "+", verify new tab appears
- [ ] Manual: open command palette, verify perspective commands listed
Perspectives invisible in UI тАФ tab bar empty, + creates nothing, no command palette entries

changes.forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1,46 +1,45 @@
 ## What

-Perspectives exist on disk in `.kanban/perspectives/` but nothing is visible in the UI:
-1. Tab bar is empty тАФ `PerspectiveTabBar` renders no tabs
-2. Clicking "+" appears to do nothing
-3. "+" button has no tooltip
-4. No perspective commands in the command palette
+Perspectives exist on disk in `.kanban/perspectives/` but the UI shows nothing. The tab bar is empty, "+" does nothing visible, there are no command palette entries, and no tooltip on "+".

-### Root cause investigation
+The FIRST thing to do is prove whether `perspective.list` returns data in an integration test, then trace the full pipeline.

-The pipeline is: `PerspectiveProvider` calls `perspective.list` on mount тЖТ `setPerspectives()` тЖТ `PerspectiveTabBar` renders. Events (`entity-created` with `entity_type === "perspective"`) trigger `refresh()`.
+### Integration test approach

-**Likely issues to check in order:**
+**1. Add perspective sample data to `createTestBoard`** in `kanban-app/ui/src/test/integration-commands.ts`:
+- After creating tasks, call `kanban(dir, 'perspective add --name "Sprint" --view board')` and `kanban(dir, 'perspective add --name "Grid View" --view grid"')`
+- Return perspective IDs and stripped perspective data alongside tasks/columns

-1. **Is `perspective.list` actually returning data?** Add `console.warn` instrumentation to `PerspectiveProvider.refresh()` (`kanban-app/ui/src/lib/perspective-context.tsx:61-71`) to log the result. Then check OS log with `log show --predicate 'subsystem == \"com.swissarmyhammer.kanban\"' --last 30s` for backend command dispatch.
+**2. Add browser integration test** in `kanban-app/ui/src/components/board-integration.browser.test.tsx`:
+- Verify `perspective.list` returns the created perspectives
+- Verify `PerspectiveTabBar` renders tabs for perspective matching the current view kind
+- Verify clicking "+" creates a new perspective (file appears on disk + tab appears)

-2. **Is `perspective.save` (from "+") succeeding?** The `.catch(console.error)` at line 71 of `perspective-tab-bar.tsx` swallows errors. Add `console.warn` before/after the dispatch. Check if the file appears in `.kanban/perspectives/` after clicking "+".
-
-3. **Are events reaching the frontend?** After the store delegation fix, `flush_and_emit_for_handle` should emit `entity-created` events with `entity_type: "perspective"`. The `PerspectiveProvider` listens for these at lines 106-116. Add a `console.warn` in the listener to confirm events arrive.
+**3. Debug the mock setup** тАФ the current `mockInvoke` in the browser test doesn't handle `dispatch_command` for `perspective.list`. It returns `null` for unknown commands (line 64). The `PerspectiveProvider` calls `backendDispatch({ cmd: "perspective.list" })` which invokes `dispatch_command`. The mock needs to return `{ perspectives: [...], count: N }`.

-4. **"+" tooltip missing** тАФ `perspective-tab-bar.tsx:154` has `aria-label="Add perspective"` but no `title` attribute.
+**4. Also add a Rust integration test** for the command + store + context pipeline:
+- In `swissarmyhammer-kanban/tests/perspective_integration.rs`, add a test with StoreHandle wired in that proves: `add perspective` тЖТ `list perspectives` тЖТ results include the added one тЖТ `flush_changes()` has pending events

-5. **No command palette entries** тАФ `perspective.yaml` commands don't have `palette: true`. Entity commands get palette visibility via `palette: true` in their YAML defs. Perspective commands need the same.
+**5. Quick fixes:**
+- `perspective-tab-bar.tsx:154` тАФ add `title="New perspective"` to "+" button  
+- `perspective.yaml` тАФ add `palette: true` to `perspective.save`, `perspective.delete`, `perspective.list`

 ### Files to modify
+- `kanban-app/ui/src/test/integration-commands.ts` тАФ add `createPerspective` command and add perspectives to `createTestBoard`
+- `kanban-app/ui/src/components/board-integration.browser.test.tsx` тАФ add perspective loading test
+- `kanban-app/ui/src/components/perspective-tab-bar.tsx:154` тАФ add tooltip
+- `swissarmyhammer-commands/builtin/commands/perspective.yaml` тАФ add `palette: true`
+- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/tests/perspective_integration.rs` тАФ add store-wired test

-- `kanban-app/ui/src/lib/perspective-context.tsx` тАФ add console.warn instrumentation in refresh() and event listeners
-- `kanban-app/ui/src/components/perspective-tab-bar.tsx:154` тАФ add `title="New perspective"` to "+" button
-- `swissarmyhammer-commands/builtin/commands/perspective.yaml` тАФ add `palette: true` to `perspective.save`, `perspective.delete`, `perspective.list`

-### Diagnostic approach
-
-This card is **investigate then fix**. Use `log show` to check backend events. Use `console.warn` instrumentation + `log show --predicate 'subsystem == "com.swissarmyhammer.kanban"'` (not browser console) to trace the full pipeline. Fix whatever is broken.
-
 ## Acceptance Criteria
-- [ ] Existing perspectives in `.kanban/perspectives/` appear in the tab bar on app load
-- [ ] Clicking "+" creates a new perspective and it appears in the tab bar immediately
-- [ ] "+" button shows tooltip "New perspective" on hover
-- [ ] `perspective.save` and `perspective.list` appear in the command palette
+- [ ] Browser integration test creates perspectives on disk and verifies they appear in `PerspectiveTabBar`
+- [ ] Rust integration test proves perspective.list returns data through the command+store pipeline
+- [ ] "+" button shows tooltip "New perspective"
+- [ ] `perspective.save` and `perspective.delete` appear in command palette
 - [ ] Verified with real board at `~/Desktop`

 ## Tests
-- [ ] `pnpm test` from `kanban-app/ui/` тАФ existing perspective-tab-bar tests pass
-- [ ] Manual: open board at ~/Desktop, verify tab bar shows perspectives
-- [ ] Manual: click "+", verify new tab appears
-- [ ] Manual: open command palette, verify perspective commands listed

+- [ ] New Rust test: add тЖТ list тЖТ verify events via StoreHandle
+- [ ] `pnpm test` from `kanban-app/ui/` тАФ all pass
+- [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-kanban` тАФ perspective tests pass

--- original

@@ -1,45 +1,46 @@
 ## What

-Perspectives exist on disk in `.kanban/perspectives/` but the UI shows nothing. The tab bar is empty, "+" does nothing visible, there are no command palette entries, and no tooltip on "+".
+Perspectives exist on disk in `.kanban/perspectives/` but nothing is visible in the UI:
+1. Tab bar is empty тАФ `PerspectiveTabBar` renders no tabs
+2. Clicking "+" appears to do nothing
+3. "+" button has no tooltip
+4. No perspective commands in the command palette

-The FIRST thing to do is prove whether `perspective.list` returns data in an integration test, then trace the full pipeline.
+### Root cause investigation

-### Integration test approach
+The pipeline is: `PerspectiveProvider` calls `perspective.list` on mount тЖТ `setPerspectives()` тЖТ `PerspectiveTabBar` renders. Events (`entity-created` with `entity_type === "perspective"`) trigger `refresh()`.

-**1. Add perspective sample data to `createTestBoard`** in `kanban-app/ui/src/test/integration-commands.ts`:
-- After creating tasks, call `kanban(dir, 'perspective add --name "Sprint" --view board')` and `kanban(dir, 'perspective add --name "Grid View" --view grid"')`
-- Return perspective IDs and stripped perspective data alongside tasks/columns
+**Likely issues to check in order:**
+
+1. **Is `perspective.list` actually returning data?** Add `console.warn` instrumentation to `PerspectiveProvider.refresh()` (`kanban-app/ui/src/lib/perspective-context.tsx:61-71`) to log the result. Then check OS log with `log show --predicate 'subsystem == \"com.swissarmyhammer.kanban\"' --last 30s` for backend command dispatch.

-**2. Add browser integration test** in `kanban-app/ui/src/components/board-integration.browser.test.tsx`:
-- Verify `perspective.list` returns the created perspectives
-- Verify `PerspectiveTabBar` renders tabs for perspective matching the current view kind
-- Verify clicking "+" creates a new perspective (file appears on disk + tab appears)
+2. **Is `perspective.save` (from "+") succeeding?** The `.catch(console.error)` at line 71 of `perspective-tab-bar.tsx` swallows errors. Add `console.warn` before/after the dispatch. Check if the file appears in `.kanban/perspectives/` after clicking "+".

-**3. Debug the mock setup** тАФ the current `mockInvoke` in the browser test doesn't handle `dispatch_command` for `perspective.list`. It returns `null` for unknown commands (line 64). The `PerspectiveProvider` calls `backendDispatch({ cmd: "perspective.list" })` which invokes `dispatch_command`. The mock needs to return `{ perspectives: [...], count: N }`.
+3. **Are events reaching the frontend?** After the store delegation fix, `flush_and_emit_for_handle` should emit `entity-created` events with `entity_type: "perspective"`. The `PerspectiveProvider` listens for these at lines 106-116. Add a `console.warn` in the listener to confirm events arrive.

-**4. Also add a Rust integration test** for the command + store + context pipeline:
-- In `swissarmyhammer-kanban/tests/perspective_integration.rs`, add a test with StoreHandle wired in that proves: `add perspective` тЖТ `list perspectives` тЖТ results include the added one тЖТ `flush_changes()` has pending events
+4. **"+" tooltip missing** тАФ `perspective-tab-bar.tsx:154` has `aria-label="Add perspective"` but no `title` attribute.

-**5. Quick fixes:**
-- `perspective-tab-bar.tsx:154` тАФ add `title="New perspective"` to "+" button  
-- `perspective.yaml` тАФ add `palette: true` to `perspective.save`, `perspective.delete`, `perspective.list`
+5. **No command palette entries** тАФ `perspective.yaml` commands don't have `palette: true`. Entity commands get palette visibility via `palette: true` in their YAML defs. Perspective commands need the same.

 ### Files to modify
-- `kanban-app/ui/src/test/integration-commands.ts` тАФ add `createPerspective` command and add perspectives to `createTestBoard`
-- `kanban-app/ui/src/components/board-integration.browser.test.tsx` тАФ add perspective loading test
-- `kanban-app/ui/src/components/perspective-tab-bar.tsx:154` тАФ add tooltip
-- `swissarmyhammer-commands/builtin/commands/perspective.yaml` тАФ add `palette: true`
-- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/tests/perspective_integration.rs` тАФ add store-wired test

+- `kanban-app/ui/src/lib/perspective-context.tsx` тАФ add console.warn instrumentation in refresh() and event listeners
+- `kanban-app/ui/src/components/perspective-tab-bar.tsx:154` тАФ add `title="New perspective"` to "+" button
+- `swissarmyhammer-commands/builtin/commands/perspective.yaml` тАФ add `palette: true` to `perspective.save`, `perspective.delete`, `perspective.list`
+
+### Diagnostic approach
+
+This card is **investigate then fix**. Use `log show` to check backend events. Use `console.warn` instrumentation + `log show --predicate 'subsystem == "com.swissarmyhammer.kanban"'` (not browser console) to trace the full pipeline. Fix whatever is broken.
+
 ## Acceptance Criteria
-- [ ] Browser integration test creates perspectives on disk and verifies they appear in `PerspectiveTabBar`
-- [ ] Rust integration test proves perspective.list returns data through the command+store pipeline
-- [ ] "+" button shows tooltip "New perspective"
-- [ ] `perspective.save` and `perspective.delete` appear in command palette
+- [ ] Existing perspectives in `.kanban/perspectives/` appear in the tab bar on app load
+- [ ] Clicking "+" creates a new perspective and it appears in the tab bar immediately
+- [ ] "+" button shows tooltip "New perspective" on hover
+- [ ] `perspective.save` and `perspective.list` appear in the command palette
 - [ ] Verified with real board at `~/Desktop`

 ## Tests
-- [ ] New browser test: "renders perspective tabs from real .kanban data"
-- [ ] New Rust test: add тЖТ list тЖТ verify events via StoreHandle
-- [ ] `pnpm test` from `kanban-app/ui/` тАФ all pass
-- [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-kanban` тАФ perspective tests pass

+- [ ] Manual: open command palette, verify perspective commands listed
